title: uinstdel
text: uinstdel Delete a component instance. Explain this code long uinstdel (UHACT hInst, long* pProcError); Copy Parameters hInst The instance handle as returned by uinstnew . pProcError (Output) The ProcScript error status, that is, the same value that would be returned by deleteinstance in $procerror . If you are not interested in this output, supply a zero value instead of a pointer. Return Values For more information, see the "Call-In API Return Codes" topic. Use Library: ucall Description uinstdel must be used to delete an instance that was created by uinstnew . It is not recommended to delete an instance whose handle was returned by uinstopn . Deleting the instance does not delete the instance handle. After deleting an instance, its handle still needs to be freed by calling ufreeh . Example: uecreate, uedelete, ufreeh, uinstdel, uinstnew, uinstopr, and uopract The following simple call-in program shows how to activate the EXEC operation of the service MYSVC. As usual, error checking has been omitted for the sake of brevity. Explain this code #include <h3gl.h> void main (void) { UHACT hEnv; /* Uniface environment */ UHACT hIn; /* Instance handle */ UHACT hOp; /* Operation handle */ long opStat; /* Activate status return parameter */ /* Create the environment */ uecreate(1, 0, 0, "my.asn", 0, 0, &hEnv); /* Instantiate service MYSVC */ uinstnew(hEnv, "MYSVC", 0, 0, UDEFAULT_COMM_MODE, 0, &hIn, 0); uinstopr(hIn, "EXEC", 0, &hOp); /* Instantiate the EXEC operation */ uopract (hOp, &opStat, 0); /* Activate the operation */ uinstdel(hIn, 0); /* Destroy the instance */ ufreeh (&hOp); /* Free the operation */ ufreeh (&hIn); /* Free the instance */ uedelete(hEnv, -1); /* Shut down the environment */ ufreeh (&hEnv); /* Free the environment handle */ return 0; // on success } Copy Related Links Call-In API Return Codes Codes that can possibly be returned by functions from the 3GL call-in API are consistent with the values returned by the ProcScript function $procerror, unless noted otherwise. ufreeh Free (delete) a handle. uinstnew Create a new instance of a Uniface 4GL component.
